positive.prompt: Run the pre-launch checklist before we go live tomorrow
What needs to be in place before shipping this to production?
Prepare the rollback plan for Friday's deploy

negative.prompt: Refine my rough product idea into something concrete
Why is this function so slow on large inputs?

evals.prompt: We ship the new checkout tomorrow. Produce the go/no-go assessment.
evals.expected_output: A pre-launch checklist result with blockers, acknowledged risks, rollback plan, and a go or no-go verdict
expectations: A rollback plan exists before the go decision
Monitoring and alerting readiness is verified
A clear go or no-go verdict is stated with blockers listed
